name: Low Activity (60 Days)
description: Companies with no completed activities in the last 60 days (or minimal engagement).

name: Renewals Next 90 Days
description: Companies with renewal_date within the next 90 days.

name: Trials / New Accounts
description: Companies currently in trial or newly created accounts needing onboarding.

name: At Risk Accounts
description: Companies showing churn indicators: low engagement or negative health flags.

name: Expansion Candidates
description: Healthy accounts with upsell or cross-sell opportunities in pipeline.

name: Enterprise Tier
description: Companies on Enterprise plan requiring white-glove support.

name: Churned Accounts
description: Former customers who have cancelled. Target for win-back campaigns.

name: Champion Contacts
description: Contacts identified as internal champions who advocate for the product.

name: Decision Makers
description: Contacts with Decision Maker or Executive role who influence purchases.
